SpecKit pipeline — no-flavor baseline capture
==============================================

Source fixture:    phaser/spec/fixtures/repos/example-minimal/recipe.rb
Source branch:     feature-example-minimal
Integration base:  main
Flavor file:       .specify/flavor.yaml (ABSENT)

This file is the byte-for-byte baseline that SC-006 / FR-025 pins.
It captures the combined stdout/stderr stream that the SpecKit
pipeline produces when run on the example-minimal fixture branch
with no flavor configuration present at the repository root. The
spec at phaser/spec/pipeline_no_flavor_baseline_spec.rb diffs
fresh captures (provided via the PHASER_PIPELINE_CAPTURE env var)
against this baseline; any drift fails the regression check.

Re-capture procedure (only after a deliberate, intentional change
to pre-feature pipeline behavior):

  1. Check out feature-example-minimal built from the fixture
     recipe (see phaser/spec/support/git_fixture_helper.rb).
  2. Confirm .specify/flavor.yaml does not exist at the
     repository root.
  3. Run the pipeline command and tee the combined output:
       /speckit.pipeline 2>&1 | tee fresh-capture.txt
  4. Sanitize the capture: strip absolute paths, machine names,
     and any token-shaped substrings before checking it in.
  5. Replace this file with the sanitized capture and re-run
     bundle exec rspec spec/pipeline_no_flavor_baseline_spec.rb
     to confirm the new baseline is accepted.

------------------------------------------------------------------
Captured stream begins below this line
------------------------------------------------------------------

Pre-flight check: required utility script present.
Agent file check: all seven required agent files present.
Flavor configuration gate: no flavor file detected — running the
pre-feature pipeline path. Holistic review only.

Execution plan: homer -> plan -> tasks -> lisa -> ralph -> marge.

Step: homer
  Iteration 1: cleared remaining ambiguity in user story 1.
  Iteration 2: returned ALL_FINDINGS_RESOLVED.
  Iterations run: 2.

Step: plan
  Skipped — plan.md already exists.

Step: tasks
  Skipped — tasks.md already exists.

Step: lisa
  Iteration 1: returned ALL_FINDINGS_RESOLVED.
  Iterations run: 1.

Step: ralph
  Quality gate validation: bash .specify/quality-gates.sh present.
  Iteration 1: implemented one task; gates green.
  Iteration 2: implemented one task; gates green.
  Iteration 3: implemented one task; gates green.
  Iteration 4: implemented one task; gates green.
  Iteration 5: returned ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE.
  Iterations run: 5.

Step: simplify
  Skill not installed — skipping post-ralph simplify pass.

Step: security-review
  Skill not installed — skipping pre-marge security pass.

Step: marge (holistic-only mode)
  Iteration 1: filed two minor findings.
  Iteration 2: returned ALL_FINDINGS_RESOLVED.
  Iterations run: 2.

------------------------------------------------------------------
Pipeline Step Status:
  specify ... skipped
  homer ..... executed
  plan ...... skipped
  tasks ..... skipped
  lisa ...... executed
  ralph ..... executed
  marge ..... executed

Iteration counts:
  homer: 2

Completion status: success
